summary: Iteration 219 PageShell regression sweep — all 4 previously failing pages from iter 218 are FIXED, and all 20 previously passing pages remain green. FINAL RESULT: 24/24 PASS. /my-settings now renders without ReferenceError (ShieldCheck import added at MySettings.jsx line 16). /retirement-planner now resolves (Route registered at AppRouter.jsx line 164) with PageShell + 'ADVISER · PROJECTIONS' eyebrow + all 7 pill labels (Overview/People/Assets/Income/Expenses/Assumptions/Projection) visible. /scenario-modelling now wraps UnifiedGoalsPlanning in PageShell with 'ADVISER · SCENARIOS' eyebrow + 2 pill tabs (Goals & Scenarios, Monte Carlo). /client-crm Navigate redirect removed — ClientCRM page now renders directly with PageShell + 'ADVISER · CRM' eyebrow + 4 metric cards (TOTAL 8, ACTIVE 6, REVIEW DUE 0, AUM $93,325,000) + 'Add client' pill + Clients/Tasks/Workflows tabs. Zero console ReferenceErrors on the 4 target pages. The only console error noise observed is 2 errors on /ai-copilot-advanced (unchanged from iter 218, did not block PageShell or page-level testid rendering — page still passes shell+testid+eyebrow). Backend re-validation skipped per request scope (testing_type=frontend only).
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 iter-218 regressions cleanly fixed with surgical edits — no collateral breakage observed across the other 20 pages.
Minor: 2 console errors on /ai-copilot-advanced persist from previous iterations (do not block shell/testid render). Worth investigating in a future pass but not blocking.
Suggest enabling ESLint react/jsx-no-undef rule to catch missing-icon-import bugs (the MySettings ShieldCheck miss type) at lint time before they reach the testing agent.
test_credentials: None. LocalStorage bypass: wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='adviser', selected_client={id:'thompson_family',name:'David & Sarah Thompson'}.
